message:
test(mvcc): add property-based coverage for cell visibility invariants

Capture the remaining uncommitted MVCC test work as a dedicated follow-up
commit rather than hiding it inside the earlier stabilization commits.

This commit adds proptest coverage for three high-value invariants in the new
cell visibility layer:
- snapshot isolation visibility across multiple committing transactions;
- conflict detection when multiple transactions target the same logical cell;
- GC safety, specifically that reclaiming older history does not erase the
  version that should still be visible at later snapshots.

Why this is separate:
- the earlier MVCC commit was about budget accounting and routing behavior;
- this follow-up is purely about strengthening the regression net around the
  same subsystem with randomized invariant checks.
